feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can BAPI BAPI_PO_CHANGE update the account assignment of a PO line with GR and invoices reversed?
entry.content:
ABAP gurus,

I need your help. I currently use BAPI BAPI_PO_CHANGE to update purchase orders in S4. There was a case that the account assignment was successfully updated for a PO line without any goods receipt or invoices posted but the account assignment  was not updated for the PO line with GR and invoices posted even the GR and invoices were reversed. ( all total of GR and invoices are zero). I also did not get any error or warning for the PO line not updated in the return table of BAPI_PO_CHANGE. 

My co-workers also tested and confirmed that they can manually update the account assignment on a PO line after the GR and invoices were reversed.

My question is that Can I use BAPI_PO_CHANGE to update the account assignment for PO lines with GR or invoice posted and reversed?  If BAPI_PO_CHANGE can update the account assignment for PO lines with GR or invoice posted and reversed, what field(s) should I populate to force the BAPI to update the account assignment?

Thanks!

 

Sincerely,

Fisher Li

entry.title: Badi's available for Workpackage level fields instead of on Project Save
entry.content:
Good day,

We are currently making use of the project validations badi (YY1_PROJECTVALIDATIONS) for both project header and workpackage level fields. However we face an issue on the workpackage level validations as the Badi only triggers Custom Checks on Project Save (/CPD/ENGMT_PROJ_SAVE) i.e: only if a change to the project header is made and saved will the Badi be initiated. Because of this key fields on the workpackage level are not being populated by end users. It is only being picked up at the time when the project stage needs to updated.

 

Is there any suggestions on how to trigger the badi when saving the workpackage or is there a specific Badi available to use for workpackage validations.

#SAPCOE

Regards,

Haaroon

entry.title: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER
entry.content: I lock the document with ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER in a method in abap. But when I release the code with F8, I check it from SM12. The lock is lifted. How can I prevent this? I see the lock has been removed. How can I prevent this? I want the lock to continue until I remove the lock.

entry.title: OLE Error : Upload Excel file without having Office installed / SY-SUBRC=2 using ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTER
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using SAP GUI 7.70 Sp12 and I have to upload excel file to S4 HANA DB. 
I get an OLE error when I try to do so. This is due to to the fact that I don't have excel offline installed on my laptop. I am currently using M365 F3 licence that allow me to use excel online only (via M365 portal). 

To be more explicit I get Getting SY-SUBRC=2 while uploading excel using ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE

Is there a way to upload excel file without having excel offline ? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Dump on HR_EVENT_UPDATE - DBSQL Duplicate key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to update/insert time record in the database TEVEN  to populate in PA61, through function modules BAPI_CC1_UPLOAD_TIMEEVENT, HR_CC1_TIMEEVENT_POST, but  I am getting the ERROR : DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR in the HR_EVENT_UPDATE  which is inside of HR_CC1_TIMEEVENT_POST, which is preventing time records to be saved.   

I kindly ask you to give insights on how to resolve this .

Thank you in advance

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: What is dump DBIF_NTAB_TABLE_NOT_FOUND?
entry.content:
Hi,

I've got a dump which is DBIF_NTAB_TABLE_NOT_FOUND. The error analysis is like below: Structure description "XXXX" was not found. In the event of a missing structure description for an include, this error may have occurred while accessing a structure or a table in which this include is used.

This error happened in an interface method calling. Does anyone explain more about this dump?

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: Adobe Form table with Header and Item Data : Nested Tables
entry.content:
Dear All,

   We have two internal tables one has header data and another has Item data.

Now requirement is we need to display First Record of header and below that corresponding Item records and so on.

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: Make a Custom Report from Standard SAP Report
entry.content:
Hello community , 

i want to make a custom report from a standard Report.

For example i wan to add on "VA05" transaction 2 more fields.

How can i do this ?

Can i copy as one Standard transaction code and then to add some fields ?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: How to Resolve the Error : HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED in RAP Application?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I created a GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud. when I am selecting all the coming data( it is around 3000+ entries ) and send all the line items to another portal I am getting this below error.

Runtime Error : HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED. The O Data request processing has been abnormally terminated.

Error Cause:- "The maximum number of HTTP client connections has been exceeded". I found that there is multiple HTTP request are generated for a Instance and I am not able to handle this case.

Thanks for your Support.

entry.title: Eclipse: How to see / change function module documentation?
entry.content: In SAPGUI there exists "Function Module Documentation". Is there a way in Eclipse to accessed and maintain it?

entry.title: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item based on condition in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to hide custom fields in Billing Document Item based on Condition? Same requirement i had in Sale order screen and achieved it through BADI. But i don't see similar BADI released for billing document to set properties of custom fields to Invisible / mandatory / read-only?

It would be grateful if you could help me in hiding custom fields in billing document item level.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to find BDC program name ?
entry.content:
Hello  all,

i want to know, how to find the program name of a BDC program which is created against the recorded transaction which was recorded in SHDB transaction code.

Thank You,

entry.title: How to develop customized reports in in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to develop Customized Reports in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps to develop customized reports.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: What's the difference between "?=" and "CAST"?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

As far as I know, CAST operation ?= only works for object reference. Is there any other difference?

Besides, is casting only possible for objects that has relationship, e.g., interface and class or super class and sub class. For objects that has no relationship, is it possible to do casting?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: How to add search function in MC86 transaction.
entry.content:
Dear team 

How to add search function in MC86 currently CTRLF is also not working in MC86.

 

BR

entry.title: Objects are imported but not generated when moved to production system
entry.content:
Hello,

The objects of Odata service and Odata project where locked in a TR and the TR was moved from Dev to Quality successfully. When the same TR was imported to Production system, all objects except odata service and few table entries were successfully imported but not generated or activated. 

How to generate or activate these objects now.

The screenshot have been attached herewith.

entry.title: Multicursor in Eclipse (ADT) by search dialog
entry.content:
Hi,
I'm trying to jump back and forth between Visual Studio Code and Eclipse a little less. And I mainly miss the multicursor function and especially the setting of multiple cursors via search. Eclipse basically offers the function in the search dialog, but it is always inactive for me. Regardless of whether I am in CDS or other source code. Is there a trick or is it not yet implemented by ADT?

entry.title: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry XXX does not exist
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
For context:
I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked the movement through the SM30 on view V_156SC_VC as I needed to add a line and couldn't find any other solution.

My problem:
When calling the BAPI, the following error comes up “Check table T156SY: entry 311 X X Q B _ P does not exist” and indeed the table row doesn't exist and I can't find a way to fill it. Either via SPRO or SM30.

Do you know how to do this?

Thanks in advance
